overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a hooded character exploring a dimly lit medieval wooden hall with a torch. The character walks around a central fire pit, examines hanging bone decorations, and approaches a seated NPC near a throne.

segments.scene_description: The character explores the immediate area around a large rectangular fire pit in a medieval wooden hall. The space is dimly lit by wall sconces and the fire itself, with red carpets covering the floor and heavy wooden pillars supporting the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall with hanging bone chandeliers

events.description: character tilts camera upward to examine the bone chandelier hanging from the ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the hall while looking up at the ceiling decorations and bone chandeliers

entered.detail: large chandelier made of bones and antlers hanging from the ceiling
long wooden dining tables with benches
strings of bones and skulls suspended from the ceiling beams
cool blue light filtering through a high window
blue and red fabric banners hanging on the walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the hall, passing the fire pit and approaching the central area. The camera tilts upward to reveal elaborate bone chandeliers and hanging decorations suspended from the wooden ceiling beams, with cool blue light filtering through high windows.

events.description: character approaches and stops before a seated NPC in an ornate wooden throne

agents.ego_description: walking toward the seated NPC and stopping to face them near the throne

notable_agents.action: sitting on a wooden throne, gesturing with hands while conversing

entered.detail: ornate high-backed throne made of twisted wood and antlers
small circular fire pit burning near the throne
decorative woven tapestries hanging on the wall
chandelier constructed from antlers and bones

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the far end of the hall where an NPC sits on an ornate wooden throne. A small fire burns nearby, and the character stops to face the seated figure, who gestures while speaking. The area is decorated with wall tapestries and antler chandeliers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medieval wooden hall that transitions from a warm fire pit area to a formal throne room. It begins by navigating the immediate vicinity of a large rectangular fire pit, where red carpets line the floor beneath heavy wooden pillars. As the character moves deeper into the hall, the camera tilts upward to reveal elaborate bone chandeliers and hanging decorations suspended from the ceiling beams, while cool blue light filters through high windows. The scene then shifts toward the far end of the hall, passing under antler chandeliers and wall tapestries. Finally, the camera comes to a stop as the character faces an NPC seated upon an ornate wooden throne beside a small, flickering fire.
